headline: NRG Energy Reshapes Ownership With LS Power Exit And US$300m Buyback
summary: LS Power has sold a significant equity stake in NRG Energy (NYSE:NRG) that it received as part of NRG's acquisition of LS Power's natural gas assets. NRG is carrying out a sizeable share buyback program alongside this sale, reshaping its shareholder base after the transaction. The move highlights a key moment for NRG's capital allocation choices and ownership mix following its recent asset deal with LS Power. NRG Energy operates as an integrated power company, with exposure to generation...
